description_long: This is a female-presenting adult pedestrian dressed in urban adventure attire, featuring a sleeveless vest layered over a fitted top and shorts. She wears fingerless gloves, a utility belt with pouches, and a holster on her right thigh, suggesting a practical, action-oriented character. Her knee-high boots and fitted shorts provide mobility, while the vest and belt add a rugged, utilitarian look. The figure's hair is styled in a medium-length, loose cut that frames her face and falls to her shoulders. The overall appearance is that of a confident, capable individual, possibly inspired by action or exploration themes. The clothing and accessories are detailed, with visible seams, straps, and buckles enhancing realism.
description: A female-presenting adult in urban adventure attire with a vest, shorts, utility belt, and knee-high boots, exuding a rugged, action-ready look. Accessories include fingerless gloves and a thigh holster.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vest, fitted top, shorts, gloves, utility belt, and holster clearly, with arms extended and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the vest, holster, and boots, with the arm and leg contours visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, belt, and boots, as well as the hair length and back details of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the holster, glove, and boot details from the opposite profile.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless utility vest, fitted top, shorts, fingerless gloves, utility belt with holster, knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
